zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Haigh於1220年12月30日出生在英國藍卡爾黑格時，她的父親William de Haigh46歲，母親Mrs. William de Haigh41歲。她於1234年與Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh在英國英格蘭格亞特 曼徹斯特博爾頓結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Haigh于1220年12月30日出生在英国藍卡爾黑格时，她的父亲William de Haigh46岁，母亲Mrs. William de Haigh41岁。她于1234年与Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh在英国英格兰格亞特 曼徹斯特博爾頓结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Haigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Yorkshire): habitational name from any of several minor places called Haigh in Yorkshire and Lancashire (from Middle English hagh ‘enclosure’, from Old English haga or Old Norse hagi), but especially that in Quarmby, between Huddersfield and Halifax.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Haigh was born on 30 December 1220, in Haigh, Lancashire, England, her father, William de Haigh, was 46 and her mother, Mrs. William de Haigh, was 41. She married Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh in 1234, in Bolton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1292, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Haigh est née le 30 décembre 1220, à Haigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Haigh, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Mrs. William de Haigh, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh en 1234, à Bolton, Greater Manchester, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1292, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Haigh am 30. Dezember 1220 in Haigh, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Haigh 46 und ihre Mutter Mrs. William de Haigh 41. Sie hat 1234 in Bolton, Greater Manchester, England, United Kingdom Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1292 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Blackrod, Lancashire, England.

Lei sposato Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh nel 1234, nel Bolton, Greater Manchester, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1292, nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Haighが1220年12月30日にイギリスランカシュアイアヘイグで生まれた時，父William de Haighは46歳，母Mrs. William de Haighは41歳であった。1234年にイギリスイギリスグレアター マンチェスターボルトンでAlain le Norreys of Formby and Haighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドで72歳で死去した。

ko.of Bradley, Cheshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브래들리 비 프로드샤
ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Haigh(이)가 1220년 12월 30일 영국 랭카실르 하이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Haigh(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. William de Haigh(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1234년 영국 잉글랜드 그리터 먼체스터 볼턴에서 Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Haigh nasceu em 30 de dezembro de 1220, em Haigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Haigh, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. William de Haigh, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh em 1234, em Bolton, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.of Bradley, Cheshire, England: брадли би фродшам, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Haigh родилась 30 декабря 1220 г. в местности хеиг, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Haigh было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. William de Haigh, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh в 1234 г. в местности болтон, гритир манчестир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1292 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Alain le Norreys of Formby and Haigh en 1234, en Bolton, Greater Manchester, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas.
